Off Calendar Apr-29-2026 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Mar-26-2026 Continued To Apr-29-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE

Appearances via Zoom:
Ryan Ardi of Quill & Arrow, LLP (818.970.2204, rardi@quillarrowlaw.com) for plaintiff and moving party; No other appearances.

The court has received the parties' stipulation to continue the matter. The court admonishes counsel for the late request to continue this motion. The court will not sign the order on the stipulated continuance request, but continues the motion to April 29, 2026. Counsel to give notice. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Feb-06-2026 Continued To Mar-26-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference

Luis A. Serrano, Esq. QUILL & ARROW, LLP (310) 933-4271 lserrano@quillarrowlaw.com Attorney for Plaintiff, BYRON LENOX DARE

No other appearances are made

Plaintiff contests the Court's tentative ruling. Counsel for defendant did not appear for todays hearing.

Hearing is held. Discussed.

PLAINTIFF BYRON DARE'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One. After discussion, Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Continued To Jan-28-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BYRON DARE'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One.

The motion is continued for hearing to January 28, 2026. Defendant has filed an opposition separate statement that references a declaration that was not filed. The court orders defendant to file all opposition papers, including an opposition brief if any, by January 14, 2026. Plaintiff may reply by January 21, 2026.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
